name: Marinated Pork
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons light brown sugar, firmly packed
3 pork tenderloins, well trimmed (12 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except pork in a bowl; mix well.
2. Place pork in a glass dish; pour marinade over the pork.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 4 to 5 hours.
4. Place pork on a wire rack in a sheet pan.
5. Slow roast at 250 degrees F for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 150 degrees F.
6. Alternatively, the pork can be broiled or grilled.
